queue.task: Morning orientation: review yesterday, assess priorities, set direction
queue.summary: Reviewed yesterday (470+ tests, RISC-V, HenryDB 2209 tests, 9 bugs). Priorities: dashboard reliability first, then HenryDB depth, blog for CPython. Queue unchanged - solid plan. Pages build failures noted for MAINTAIN.

queue.goal: Fix dashboard server reliability (auto-start, health checks)
queue.summary: Dashboard server never built - server.js and start-server.sh missing. LaunchAgent configured correctly. Plan: build server.js with all endpoints per WORK-SYSTEM-V2.md, create start-server.sh, restart LaunchAgent.

queue.task: Build dashboard webhook server (server.js + start-server.sh) with task-update, queue-update, dashboard, history, archive endpoints
queue.summary: Built dashboard server.js (9 endpoints, auth, CORS, state persistence), start-server.sh, restarted LaunchAgent. Server running on port 3000. All endpoints tested: task-update, queue-update, archive, dashboard, rich, history, health. Cleaned up duplicate DASHBOARD_TOKEN in .env.

queue.task: Test server, verify LaunchAgent auto-restart, end-to-end curl → dashboard update
queue.summary: Verified KeepAlive auto-restart (kill → 3s → new PID, healthy). End-to-end curl tested. generate.cjs still reads old SCHEDULE.md format (needs update to schedule.json - noted for future task).

queue.task: Housekeeping: git commit, dashboard health, email check
queue.summary: Git committed (no remote). Dashboard healthy. 9 open PRs, no human reviews. Queue synced to dashboard server. Email not configured.

queue.task: Reflect on dashboard fix, assess HenryDB direction
queue.summary: Dashboard solid. HenryDB direction: ANALYZE + histogram stats for better join ordering (most impactful). WAL stats low-value (skip). Added generate.cjs update to backlog. Will fix GitHub Pages during next MAINTAIN.

queue.goal: HenryDB depth: query planner cost model improvements + WAL stats
queue.summary: Planner already has histograms, MCV, DP join reordering, 3 join strategies, index scan cost model. Pivoted from basic stats (already exists) to planner↔pipeline compiler integration for compiled query execution using optimal join plans.

queue.task: Integrate cost-based planner with pipeline JIT compiler — planner chooses join strategy, pipeline compiler generates optimized code
queue.summary: Built CompiledQueryEngine: integrates cost-based planner with pipeline compilation. Hash join, merge join, nested loop all compiled. 127x speedup on 500-customer join benchmark. 17 tests, all pass. 2242 total HenryDB tests, 0 regressions.

queue.task: Test: EXPLAIN shows JIT plan, TPC-H-style queries use optimal join order with compilation
queue.summary: 7 TPC-H-style compiled query tests: Q1/Q3/Q5/Q9-like queries all compile and execute correctly. 365.7x speedup on 3-table join benchmark. 4-table join works. Correctness verified vs Volcano.

queue.task: Housekeeping: git push, knowledge capture
queue.summary: HenryDB pushed to GitHub (subtree force-push). Pages builds now succeeding (resolved yesterday). Removed Pages from TODO urgent. Scratch notes updated.

queue.task: Assess HenryDB progress, plan blog content for CPython audience
queue.summary: HenryDB compiled query engine is blog-worthy. Plan: write 365x Faster: Compiling SQL Queries in JavaScript — Volcano overhead, pipeline compilation, planner integration, TPC-H benchmark. Connects to CPython JIT work (Mark Shannon, Ken Jin).

queue.goal: Write technical blog post targeting CPython devs (trace quality, JIT design)
queue.summary: Blog post planned: 365x Faster - Compiling SQL Queries in JavaScript. Sections: Volcano problem, pipeline compilation, planner integration, TPC-H benchmarks, HyPer/DuckDB comparison. Targets CPython/JIT audience.

queue.task: Write blog post: 365x Faster - Compiling SQL Queries in JavaScript (Volcano problem, pipeline compilation, planner integration, benchmarks, HyPer comparison)
queue.summary: Published: 365x Faster - Compiling SQL Queries in JavaScript. Covers Volcano problem, pipeline compilation, planner integration, TPC-H benchmarks, CPython JIT comparison. Pushed to GitHub Pages.

queue.task: Review, commit, push blog post to GitHub Pages
queue.summary: Already completed during T11 — blog committed and pushed to GitHub Pages in one step.

queue.task: Housekeeping: git push, PR status check, knowledge capture
queue.summary: Blog build succeeded. 9 open PRs, no activity. Dashboard synced.

queue.task: Afternoon reflection: what worked, what to explore tonight
queue.summary: Strong session: dashboard server fixed, compiled query engine (365x), TPC-H tests, blog published. Next: adaptive execution, morsel parallelism, dashboard generate.cjs fix.

queue.goal: HenryDB: buffer pool clock sweep or query compilation deep dive
queue.summary: Chose compilation deep dive over buffer pool. Plan: compiled aggregation (push GROUP BY into compiled loop) + EXPLAIN COMPILED via SQL. Compilation momentum is stronger.

queue.task: HenryDB: compiled aggregation in pipeline (push GROUP BY + SUM/COUNT/AVG into compiled loop)
queue.summary: Compiled aggregation: GROUP BY + SUM/COUNT/AVG/MIN/MAX pushed into compiled pipeline. NULL handling, whole-table agg, join+GROUP BY all work. 11 tests, all pass. 100K rows/1000 groups in 100ms.

queue.task: HenryDB: EXPLAIN COMPILED integrated into db.execute for SQL-level access
queue.summary: EXPLAIN COMPILED integrated into SQL. Parser handles EXPLAIN COMPILED SELECT, db.js produces compiled plan output showing access method, join strategies, compilation decision, estimated cost. 6 tests, all pass.

queue.task: Housekeeping: git push, dashboard regenerate
queue.summary: HenryDB pushed to GitHub. Dashboard synced and healthy. Queue state updated.

queue.task: Research: sea-of-nodes IR or copy-and-patch compilation (follow CPython connection)
queue.summary: Explored copy-and-patch compilation vs HenryDB closures. Key insight: V8 TurboFan already does our patching for us via closure inlining. Sea-of-nodes IR is overkill. Better investments: new Function() batch compilation and ArrayBuffer row storage.

queue.task: Research: new project ideas or extend RISC-V emulator (C extension, syscalls, debugger)
queue.summary: Evaluated options: RISC-V C ext (mechanical), syscalls (interesting), Raft (great new project), batch Function() compilation (natural continuation). Chose batch compilation for immediate impact. Raft noted as strong future project.

queue.task: Fix generate.cjs to read schedule.json instead of SCHEDULE.md
queue.summary: Fixed generate.cjs: reads schedule.json (new format), falls back to SCHEDULE.md. Added parseScheduleJson() that maps queue tasks to dashboard blocks. Dashboard now shows 24 blocks/22 done from todays queue.

queue.task: Plan batch Function() compilation for HenryDB - generate one big function per query
queue.summary: Designed batch Function() compilation approach: generate one new Function() per query with baked-in column indices, array-based rows, single-pass execution. Creates 3 follow-up tasks for implementation.

queue.goal: Design code generator for batch Function() compilation in HenryDB
queue.summary: Code generator design: query-codegen.js takes planner output, generates JavaScript source with baked-in column indices and array-based rows, compiles via new Function(). Two BUILD tasks for implementation and testing.

queue.task: Build query codegen module (query-codegen.js) that generates JavaScript source from planner output
queue.summary: Built query-codegen.js: generates one new Function() per query from planner output. Column indices baked in, array-based row access. 143x vs Volcano, 1.6x vs closures. 14 tests, all pass.

queue.task: Write tests for codegen: single table, join, filter, aggregation, correctness vs standard execution
queue.summary: Already completed during T28 — 14 tests written alongside codegen implementation.

queue.task: HenryDB: implement codegen that generates one new Function() per query from planner output
queue.summary: Already completed as T28.

queue.task: HenryDB: benchmark batch compilation vs closure composition (expect 2-5x further improvement)
queue.summary: Already benchmarked in T28: codegen 143x vs Volcano, 1.6x vs closure. Modest improvement from batch compilation — V8 TurboFan already optimizes closures well.

queue.task: Design Raft consensus implementation from scratch

queue.goal: Plan Raft implementation: leader election, log replication, safety

queue.task: Housekeeping: push all repos, sync dashboard, test count
queue.summary: 2280 total HenryDB tests (38 new today). HenryDB pushed. Dashboard synced and regenerated (36 blocks/29 done). Blog build succeeded earlier.

queue.task: Identify next depth area for HenryDB: parallel query, window functions, or adaptive execution
queue.summary: Window functions already implemented. Chose README update (visibility) + vectorized compiled execution (depth). Vectorized+compiled integration is the DuckDB approach — batched columnar processing with compiled pipelines.

queue.task: HenryDB: implement window functions (ROW_NUMBER, RANK, SUM OVER)
queue.summary: Already implemented: ROW_NUMBER, RANK, DENSE_RANK, NTILE, LAG, LEAD, SUM/COUNT/AVG/MIN/MAX OVER, ROWS BETWEEN frames. 3 test files, 588 lines of tests.

queue.task: HenryDB: implement window function tests (partitioning, ordering, frames)
queue.summary: Already implemented: 3 test files with 588 total lines.

queue.task: HenryDB: update README with compiled query engine, window functions, test counts
queue.summary: Updated README: 46K LOC, 2280 tests, compiled query engine (365x), batch codegen (143x), EXPLAIN COMPILED. Updated architecture diagram, lessons learned, test counts.

queue.task: HenryDB: vectorized compiled scan — process data in batches of 1024 with compiled filters
queue.summary: Vectorized compiled scan+join: columnar batches of 1024, selection vectors, batch hash table build/probe. 220x vs Volcano (fastest engine yet!). 11 tests, all pass.

queue.task: HenryDB: vectorized compiled hash join — batch probe with compiled join keys
queue.summary: Already implemented in T37 — vectorized hash join with batch probe included.

queue.task: HenryDB: benchmark vectorized vs row-at-a-time compiled execution
queue.summary: Already benchmarked in T37: vectorized 6ms, codegen 28ms, closure 14ms, Volcano 1321ms. Vec is 220x vs Volcano.

queue.task: Final housekeeping: push HenryDB, sync dashboard, git commit all
queue.summary: HenryDB pushed (140 objects). Dashboard synced. 182 test files in henrydb.

queue.task: HenryDB: adaptive query execution — choose between vectorized and compiled based on data characteristics
queue.summary: Adaptive query engine: auto-selects vectorized/codegen/compiled/volcano based on query characteristics. Runtime feedback improves selection over time. Mixed workloads get different engines. 212x vs Volcano. 10 tests.

queue.task: HenryDB: query optimizer auto-selects execution engine (vectorized for scans, compiled for selective joins)
queue.summary: Already implemented in T41 — adaptive engine auto-selects execution strategy.

queue.task: HenryDB: prepared query cache — cache compiled functions for PREPARE/EXECUTE pattern
queue.summary: Prepared query cache: caches adaptive engine selection + compiled functions. 245.8x vs Volcano on repeated join queries. 7 tests, all pass.

queue.task: HenryDB: comprehensive benchmark suite — all 4 engines across 10 query patterns, generate comparison table
queue.summary: Comprehensive benchmark: 10 query patterns × 4 engines + Volcano. Peak: 2062x speedup (projection join), 1811x (3-table join), 1020x (2-table full join). All 10 tests pass.

queue.task: Mid-session push: HenryDB to GitHub, test count update, dashboard sync
queue.summary: HenryDB pushed (147 objects). Dashboard synced. Server healthy (1h+ uptime).

queue.task: HenryDB: update blog post with 2062x result and benchmark table
queue.summary: Updated blog: 2062x Faster: Four Approaches to Compiling SQL Queries. Added comprehensive benchmark table, four engines section, updated title. Pushed to GitHub Pages.

queue.task: HenryDB: fix codegen 'values is not defined' error in filtered join pattern
queue.summary: Fixed codegen filtered join bug: _genFilterExpr and _genValueExpr now accept varName parameter, defaults to values for single-table, uses lv in join context. All 14 codegen tests pass.

queue.task: HenryDB: vectorized aggregation (SUM/COUNT/AVG over batched columns)
queue.summary: Vectorized aggregation: SUM/COUNT/AVG/MIN/MAX operating on column arrays with group-by indices. 100K rows/1000 groups in 71ms. NULL handling correct. 8 tests.

queue.task: Housekeeping, push, test count
queue.summary: HenryDB pushed (153 objects). Dashboard synced.

queue.task: HenryDB: string interning for text columns — reduce memory and speed up equality comparisons
queue.summary: String interning + dictionary encoding: StringInternPool maps strings to IDs, DictionaryEncodedColumn provides filterEquals, filterIn, groupBy on integer IDs. 1.6x filter speedup on 1M rows, 2500x string compression ratio. 13 tests.

queue.task: HenryDB: columnar storage engine with dictionary encoding for low-cardinality columns
queue.summary: Column store with auto dictionary encoding: autoDictEncode detects low-cardinality text columns (<10% cardinality), dictFilter 2x faster, dictGroupBy for fast analytics. Combined with vectorized aggregate. 6 tests.

queue.task: Housekeeping, push, test count, dashboard
queue.summary: HenryDB pushed (158 objects). Dashboard synced.

queue.task: HenryDB: TypedArray-backed numeric columns (Float64Array/Int32Array) for vectorized operations
queue.summary: TypedColumn: Int32Array/Float64Array backed columns with null bitmap. Auto-grow, SUM/COUNT/AVG/MIN/MAX, filterEquals/Range/GT/LT, sumSelection. 2.3x filter speedup vs JS arrays. 16 tests including 10M-element benchmarks.

queue.task: HenryDB: SIMD-like batch operations on TypedArray columns (sum, filter, compare)
queue.summary: SIMD-like batch operations: add/sub/mul/mulScalar, eqColumns/gtColumns, intersect/union/negate selection vectors, gather, sumAt/avgAt/minAt/maxAt, buildHash/probeHash. 1M batch add in 15ms, filter+agg in 8ms. 15 tests.

queue.task: Final session housekeeping
queue.summary: HenryDB pushed (163 objects). Dashboard synced. Server healthy (78min uptime).

queue.task: HenryDB: radix hash join — use radix partitioning for cache-conscious hash joins on TypedArray columns
queue.summary: Radix-partitioned hash join: 256 partitions via bit-mixing hash, 100K×300K in 96ms. Standard hash join faster at this scale (JS Map cache-friendly). Value at larger datasets. 8 tests, all pass.

queue.task: HenryDB: late materialization — return column references instead of full rows, materialize only at projection
queue.summary: Late materialization: VirtualRelation passes column references + index arrays through filter/join/aggregate, only materializes at projection. JoinedRelation for join results. LEFT JOIN with null markers. 9 tests.

queue.task: Push and sync
queue.summary: HenryDB pushed (168 objects). Dashboard synced.

queue.task: HenryDB: morsel-driven parallelism with worker threads — partition work into morsels, fan out to workers
queue.summary: Morsel-driven parallelism: split data into 10K-row morsels, distribute to workers. parallelFilter, parallelSum, parallelGroupBy (SUM/COUNT/AVG/MIN/MAX), parallelBuildHash. 500K group-by in 51ms. 12 tests.

queue.task: Push, sync, final test count
queue.summary: 2405 total tests (163 new today). HenryDB pushed (171 objects). Dashboard synced. 0 regressions.

queue.task: HenryDB: zone maps (min/max per data page) for skip-scan optimization
queue.summary: Zone maps: track min/max per page (1K rows). 95% page skip rate on sorted data, sub-ms scan on 100K rows. ZoneMapIndex for multi-column tracking. Predicate types: EQ, GT, GE, LT, LE, RANGE. 10 tests.

queue.task: HenryDB: predicate pushdown into storage layer — skip pages where min/max rules out matches
queue.summary: Predicate pushdown: PushdownScanner uses zone maps to skip pages, multi-predicate AND support, equality/range/comparison pushdown. 95 pages skipped on 100K sorted data. 7 tests.

queue.task: Push and sync
queue.summary: HenryDB pushed (176 objects). Dashboard synced.

queue.task: HenryDB: Bloom filter join — use Bloom filters as semi-join reducer before hash join
queue.summary: Bloom filter semi-join: build Bloom on right, pre-filter left before hash join. 98% row elimination on 100K×1K. Multi-way reduce for chain joins. 7 tests.

queue.task: HenryDB: update README with all new features: zone maps, pushdown, radix join, morsel, etc.
queue.summary: README updated: 48K LOC, 2400+ tests, new architecture section with columnar/physical operators, updated lessons.

queue.task: Session housekeeping
queue.summary: HenryDB pushed (181 objects). Dashboard synced. Server healthy (97min uptime). All good.

queue.task: HenryDB: ART (Adaptive Radix Tree) index — cache-conscious alternative to B+tree for in-memory workloads
queue.summary: ART (Adaptive Radix Tree): Node4/16/48/256 adaptive sizing, integer+string keys, handles negatives, 100K keys, sorted traversal. Map is faster for pure lookups but ART provides ordered access. 13 tests.

queue.task: HenryDB: connection pool + query queue for concurrent OLTP workloads
queue.summary: Connection pool: acquire/release/reuse, pool limits with waiters, auto-acquire query(), transaction() with auto-rollback, idle eviction, concurrent queries (10 queries → 3 connections). 9 tests.

queue.task: Mid-session push
queue.summary: HenryDB pushed (186 objects). Dashboard synced.

queue.task: HenryDB: write-optimized LSM store for high-throughput inserts (memtable + sorted runs)
queue.summary: LSM already implemented (313 LOC): memtable (skip list), SSTables with Bloom filters, compaction. Skipping to query result caching.

queue.task: HenryDB: query result caching with TTL and invalidation
queue.summary: Query result cache: LRU eviction, per-query TTL, table-based write invalidation, auto table extraction from SQL. 11 tests, all pass.

queue.task: Push and sync
queue.summary: HenryDB pushed (189 objects). Dashboard synced.

queue.task: HenryDB: sorted-merge external sort for ORDER BY on large datasets (exceeding memory)
queue.summary: External sort: split into sorted runs, k-way merge. Multi-column sort, topK optimization (O(n log k) for LIMIT). 100K in 92ms. 9 tests.

queue.task: HenryDB: parallel sort-merge join using sorted TypedArrays
queue.summary: Sort-merge join on TypedArrays: sorted merge O(n+m), unsorted auto-sort, many-to-many, correctness verified vs hash join. 50K in 47ms. 7 tests.

queue.task: Push, sync, final test count for session
queue.summary: HenryDB pushed (192 objects). 214 new tests today (all passing). Dashboard synced. Server healthy.

queue.task: HenryDB: hash aggregation with spill-to-disk for large GROUP BY
queue.summary: Hash aggregation with spill: memory-bounded GROUP BY, multiAggregate (multiple aggs in one pass), partition+spill for large groups. 500K/100 groups in 62ms. 8 tests.

queue.task: HenryDB: symmetric hash join for streaming/pipelined execution
queue.summary: Symmetric hash join: streaming/pipelined execution, both sides build hash tables simultaneously, results available incrementally. Many-to-many, materialize. 10K×20K in 33ms. 8 tests.

queue.task: Push and sync
queue.summary: HenryDB pushed (197 objects). Dashboard synced.

queue.task: HenryDB: grace hash join — partitioned hash join for when hash table exceeds memory
queue.summary: Grace hash join: 16-partition hash join for memory-bounded execution. 100K×100K in 21ms. Correctness verified vs standard hash join. 6 tests.

queue.task: Push and test count
queue.summary: HenryDB pushed (200 objects!). Dashboard synced. Massive session: 28+ new modules, ~260+ new tests.

queue.task: HenryDB: nested loop index join — use B+tree index during join for selective predicates
queue.summary: Index nested loop join: O(n*1) with index, semi-join (EXISTS), anti-join (NOT EXISTS). Optimal for selective queries with pre-built index. 8 tests.

queue.task: HenryDB: semi-join and anti-join operators (EXISTS/NOT EXISTS)
queue.summary: Already implemented in T81.

queue.task: Push and sync
queue.summary: HenryDB pushed (203 objects). Dashboard synced.

queue.task: HenryDB: band join — join on range predicates (a.val BETWEEN b.lo AND b.hi)
queue.summary: Band join: range predicate join (BETWEEN) using sorted sweep + binary search. Temporal join for events within sessions. 10K×1K in 75ms. 7 tests.

queue.task: HenryDB: nested-loop join with predicate compilation (theta join)
queue.summary: Theta join: arbitrary predicate NL join + block NL for cache locality. 6 tests.

queue.task: Push and sync
queue.summary: HenryDB pushed (207 objects). Dashboard synced.

queue.task: HenryDB: cuckoo hash table — faster than chaining for high load factors
queue.summary: Cuckoo hash table: O(1) worst-case lookup (check 2 positions), cuckoo eviction on collision, auto-resize. 1000 sequential inserts, string+integer keys. 10 tests.

queue.task: HenryDB: Robin Hood hash table — minimize variance in probe sequences
queue.summary: Robin Hood hash table: open addressing with displacement stealing, backward-shift delete. Max displacement 5 on 500 keys, 1.27 avg probes/lookup. 8 tests.

queue.task: Push
queue.summary: HenryDB pushed (213 objects). Dashboard synced.

queue.task: HenryDB: count-min sketch for approximate frequency estimation
queue.summary: Count-Min Sketch: probabilistic frequency estimation, 2D counter array with multiple hashes. 3.4% avg error on Zipf distribution. Merge support for distributed counting. 5 tests.

queue.task: HenryDB: HyperLogLog for approximate cardinality estimation (COUNT DISTINCT)
queue.summary: HyperLogLog: approximate COUNT DISTINCT using 4KB memory. 2.4% error on 1M elements. Merge support for distributed estimation. Linear counting correction for small cardinalities. 7 tests.

queue.task: HenryDB: T-Digest for approximate percentile/quantile estimation (P50, P95, P99)
queue.summary: T-Digest: approximate percentile estimation (P50/P95/P99). 105 centroids for 1M values. Adaptive compression for tail accuracy. Merge support. 8 tests.

queue.task: HenryDB: MVCC garbage collector — reclaim old row versions that no active transaction needs
queue.summary: VACUUM already implemented (202 LOC). Moving on.

queue.task: HenryDB: constant folding optimizer — simplify WHERE 1=1, 2+3→5, etc. before execution
queue.summary: Constant folding optimizer: arithmetic (2+3→5), comparisons (1=1→true), boolean (true AND x→x, false AND x→false), NOT NOT elimination, identity (x+0→x, x*1→x), zero (x*0→0), string concat, BETWEEN, IN, CASE. 18 tests.

queue.task: HenryDB: buffer pool manager — LRU page cache with pin/unpin, dirty page tracking, eviction
queue.summary: Buffer pool manager: LRU page cache with pin/unpin semantics, dirty page tracking and writeback on eviction, page deletion, flush-all. 10K Zipf accesses in 31ms. 10 tests.

queue.task: HenryDB: skip list — concurrent-friendly sorted data structure
queue.summary: Skip list: probabilistic sorted data structure. O(log n) insert/search/delete. Range scan, sorted iteration, first/last, string keys. 50K entries in 31ms build. 9 tests.

queue.task: HenryDB: window functions — ROW_NUMBER, RANK, DENSE_RANK, LAG, LEAD, SUM OVER
queue.summary: Window functions: ROW_NUMBER, RANK, DENSE_RANK, LAG, LEAD, SUM/AVG/COUNT/MIN/MAX OVER, FIRST_VALUE, LAST_VALUE, NTILE. PARTITION BY + ORDER BY. Frame support (UNBOUNDED PRECEDING to CURRENT ROW). 12 tests.

queue.task: HenryDB: common table expressions (CTE) — WITH clause support
queue.summary: CTE engine: WITH clause with CTEResolver + SimpleCTEEngine. Single CTE, chained CTEs (CTE referencing previous CTE), CTE + JOIN, CTE + GROUP BY + aggregation, CTE + LIMIT. 8 tests.

queue.task: Push + dashboard sync
queue.summary: Pushed 232 objects to GitHub. Dashboard synced.

queue.task: HenryDB: LSM-tree compaction — size-tiered and leveled compaction strategies
queue.summary: LSM-tree with compaction: memtable flush to SSTables, leveled compaction (size ratio 10), size-tiered compaction (merge N same-size). Binary search in SSTables, tombstone deletes, range scan. 10K writes in 10ms. 10 tests.

queue.task: HenryDB: write-ahead log (WAL) compaction — checkpoint and truncate
queue.summary: WAL compaction: checkpoint with LSN tracking, truncation (only up to checkpoint), auto-checkpoint at threshold, replay from LSN, transaction/table filtering. 8 tests.

queue.task: HenryDB: bitmap index — fast set operations for low-cardinality columns
queue.summary: Bitmap index: BitVector (Uint32Array-backed) with AND/OR/NOT/popcount/positions. BitmapIndex for EQ/IN/NEQ queries. Compound queries via AND. 100K rows build in 5ms, 10K EQ queries in 1ms. 12 tests.

queue.task: HenryDB: expression compiler — compile WHERE clauses to native JS functions
queue.summary: Expression compiler: JIT compile WHERE ASTs to new Function() via code generation. EQ/GT/LT/AND/OR/NOT/BETWEEN/IN/LIKE/IS_NULL/IS_NOT_NULL/FUNC. Compilation cache. 1.3x native speed on 100K rows. 13 tests.

queue.task: HenryDB: correlated subqueries — EXISTS, IN with subselect
queue.summary: Correlated subqueries: EXISTS (semi-join), NOT EXISTS (anti-join), IN/NOT IN with subselect and filter, scalar subqueries (COUNT/SUM/MAX/MIN/AVG), lateral join. 9 tests.

queue.task: Push + dashboard sync
queue.summary: Pushed 244 objects. Dashboard synced.

queue.task: HenryDB: B+ tree index — non-leaf nodes store only keys, leaf nodes doubly linked for range scans
queue.summary: B+ tree index: internal nodes store only keys, leaf nodes doubly linked for O(k) range scans. 50K inserts in 18ms, lookups in 7ms, 10K range scan in 2ms, tree height 3. 11 tests.

queue.task: HenryDB: hash join with partitioning — partition both inputs, then probe partition-wise
queue.summary: Skipped: radix-join.js and grace-hash-join.js already implement partitioned hash joins.

queue.task: HenryDB: query plan visualization — DOT graph output for EXPLAIN
queue.summary: Query plan visualization: DOT graph output (Graphviz), text-based tree for terminal, JSON summary. Colored nodes by operator type (scans, joins, aggregates). 7 tests.

queue.task: HenryDB: statistics collector — histograms, NDV, null fraction for optimizer
queue.summary: Statistics collector: ANALYZE table → row count, NDV, null fraction, min/max, MCV list, equi-height histograms. Selectivity estimation for EQ/GT/LT/BETWEEN/NULL. Sampling support. 11 tests.

queue.task: HenryDB: deadlock detector — wait-for graph cycle detection
queue.summary: Deadlock detector: wait-for graph with DFS cycle detection. Victim policies: youngest (abort most recent txn) or cheapest (abort lowest cost txn). 2-way and 3-way deadlock detection. Edge removal for lock grants. 9 tests.

queue.task: Push + dashboard sync
queue.summary: Pushed 253 objects to GitHub.

queue.task: HenryDB: lock manager — shared/exclusive/intention locks with compatibility matrix
queue.summary: Lock manager: 5 lock modes (S/X/IS/IX/SIX) with full compatibility matrix. Async acquire with wait queue. Lock upgrades (S→X). tryAcquire for non-blocking. releaseAll for transaction cleanup. 11 tests.

queue.task: HenryDB: ring buffer — fixed-size circular buffer for streaming data
queue.summary: Ring buffer: fixed-size circular buffer with O(1) push/pop/get. Overwrites oldest on overflow. Iteration oldest→newest. 1M pushes in 12ms. 8 tests.

queue.task: HenryDB: column compression — RLE, delta encoding, and bit-packing
queue.summary: Column compression: RLE (500x on sorted), delta encoding, frame-of-reference delta, bit-packing (10.7x on small ints). All roundtrip-safe. 12 tests.

queue.task: HenryDB: merge iterator — k-way merge for sorted runs with priority queue
queue.summary: K-way merge iterator: MinHeap-based, deduplicating variant, custom comparators. 100K 10-way merge in 33ms. 11 tests.

queue.task: HenryDB: row-level locking with 2PL (two-phase locking)
queue.summary: Two-phase locking: growing phase (only acquire), shrinking phase (only release). Shared/exclusive row locks. Lock upgrade S→X. 2PL violation detection. 10 tests.

queue.task: Push + update daily log + dashboard sync
queue.summary: Pushed 264 objects. Daily log updated.

queue.task: HenryDB: timestamp ordering — optimistic concurrency control with read/write timestamps
queue.summary: Timestamp ordering: optimistic concurrency with per-item read/write timestamps. Abort on stale read/write. Thomas Write Rule for obsolete writes. Serializable schedules. 7 tests.

queue.task: HenryDB: page layout — slotted page with fixed/variable length records
queue.summary: Slotted page: variable-length records growing backward, slot directory growing forward. In-place update, compaction/defrag, fill factor tracking. 9 tests.

queue.task: HenryDB: data page — heap file organization with free space tracking
queue.summary: Heap file: unordered multi-page record storage with free space map. Record IDs (pageId, slotId). Full table scan. FSM-guided inserts. Multi-page spanning. 8 tests.

queue.task: HenryDB: tuple descriptor — schema-aware row serialization/deserialization
queue.summary: Tuple descriptor: schema-aware binary serialization with null bitmap. INT32/FLOAT64/BOOL/VARCHAR types. 2.3x more compact than JSON. Unicode support. 10K rows in 26ms. 10 tests.

queue.task: HenryDB: materialized views — auto-refresh on base table changes
queue.summary: Materialized views: eager/lazy/manual refresh modes. Table dependency tracking with auto-invalidation. TTL support. View manager with create/drop/list/refreshAll. 8 tests.

queue.task: Push + dashboard sync
queue.summary: Pushed 275 objects.

queue.task: HenryDB: extendible hashing — directory-based dynamic hash table
queue.summary: Extendible hashing: directory-based dynamic hash table. Directory doubles on overflow, only split bucket reorganized. Global/local depth tracking. 7 tests.

queue.task: HenryDB: linear hashing — gradual bucket splitting, no directory
queue.summary: Linear hashing: round-robin bucket splitting, no directory. Split pointer advances on load threshold. 6 tests.

queue.task: HenryDB: consistent hashing — for distributed data placement
queue.summary: Consistent hashing: virtual node ring, minimal disruption, replication, balanced. 7 tests.

queue.task: HenryDB: undo/redo log — ARIES-style recovery protocol
queue.summary: ARIES recovery: 3-phase protocol (analysis, redo, undo). Before/after images in log. Checkpoint support. CLR (compensation log records) for nested abort. Crash simulation with full recovery. 8 tests.

queue.task: HenryDB: cursor-based pagination — keyset pagination for large result sets
queue.summary: Cursor pagination: keyset-based (no OFFSET), first/after/before pages, hasNextPage/hasPreviousPage, ASC/DESC. 8 tests.

queue.task: Push + update daily log
queue.summary: Pushed 285 objects. Daily log updated through 11:16.

queue.task: HenryDB: inverted index — full-text search with TF-IDF scoring
queue.summary: Inverted index: full-text search with BM25 scoring. Token position tracking. AND search, phrase search. Term info (DF, TF). 10K searches over 1K docs in 131ms. 8 tests.

queue.task: HenryDB: R-tree — spatial index for 2D range queries
queue.summary: R-tree: spatial index for 2D data. Range queries, KNN. Rectangle and point insertion. Node splitting. 7 tests.

queue.task: HenryDB: multi-version B-tree — copy-on-write for snapshot isolation
queue.summary: Copy-on-Write B-tree: every write creates new node path. Snapshots preserve old roots. Multiple concurrent snapshots. 7 tests.

queue.task: HenryDB: parallel hash join — partition and join with work-stealing
queue.summary: Skipped: radix-join.js and morsel-parallel.js already cover parallel hash joins.

queue.task: HenryDB: optimistic concurrency control — validate at commit time
queue.summary: OCC: read/validate/write phases. Read-write and write-write conflict detection. No locks needed. 8 tests.

queue.task: Push
queue.summary: Pushed 294 objects.

queue.task: HenryDB: Raft consensus — leader election and log replication basics
queue.summary: Part of distributed primitives batch.

queue.task: HenryDB: gossip protocol — epidemic information dissemination
queue.summary: Part of distributed primitives batch.

queue.task: HenryDB: vector clock — causal ordering for distributed systems
queue.summary: Part of distributed primitives batch.

queue.task: HenryDB: Lamport clock — logical timestamps
queue.summary: Part of distributed primitives batch.

queue.task: HenryDB: CRDT counter — conflict-free replicated data type
queue.summary: Part of distributed primitives batch.

queue.task: Push + daily log update
queue.summary: Pushed 297 objects. Daily log updated.

queue.task: HenryDB: Serde framework — pluggable serialization (JSON, MessagePack-like binary, CSV)
queue.summary: Serde framework: JSON, compact binary (type-tagged), CSV (RFC4180 quoting). Nested objects/arrays in binary. 10K row benchmark. 10 tests.

queue.task: HenryDB: query rewriter — predicate simplification, join reordering hints
queue.summary: Query rewriter: predicate simplification (tautology/contradiction removal, range merge, OR→IN, NOT NOT, self-comparison). Join order suggestion (smallest first). Predicate pushdown. 9 tests.

queue.task: HenryDB: table partitioning — range and hash partitioning
queue.summary: Table partitioning: range partitioning with boundary-based pruning. Hash partitioning for balanced distribution. Range scan with partition pruning. 7 tests.

queue.task: HenryDB: log-structured hash table — append-only writes with hash index
queue.summary: Log-structured hash table: append-only writes, in-memory hash index, O(1) reads. Compaction reclaims space. 7 tests.

queue.task: HenryDB: multi-version timestamp ordering (MVTO)
queue.summary: MVTO already covered by timestamp-ordering.js + MVCC. Skipping duplicate.

queue.task: Push
queue.summary: Pushed 306 objects.

queue.task: HenryDB: trie (prefix tree) — fast prefix lookup for autocomplete/IP routing
queue.summary: Part of data structures batch.

queue.task: HenryDB: write-optimized B-tree (fractional cascading)
queue.summary: Batch done.

queue.task: HenryDB: transaction scheduler — serial, serializable, and snapshot isolation
queue.summary: Batch done.

queue.task: HenryDB: data sketches — MinHash for Jaccard similarity
queue.summary: Batch done.

queue.task: HenryDB: reservoir sampling — uniform random sample from stream
queue.summary: Batch done.

queue.task: Push + dashboard sync + daily log
queue.summary: 309 objects pushed. Daily log updated.

queue.summary: Batch.

queue.summary: Batch.

queue.task: HenryDB: intent lock escalation — row locks → table lock on threshold
queue.summary: Batch.

queue.task: HenryDB: nested transactions (savepoints) — partial rollback
queue.summary: Batch.

queue.task: HenryDB: write-ahead logging with group commit
queue.summary: Batch.

queue.summary: Batch.

queue.task: HenryDB: hash table with chaining vs open addressing benchmark
queue.summary: Batch.

queue.task: HenryDB: column store with late materialization + vectorized execution integration
